description_long: This object is a handheld electronic gaming device, specifically resembling a Game Boy Advance. The front features a large rectangular screen centered within a black bezel, flanked by a set of physical control buttons on both sides. The left side has a directional pad and two smaller buttons, while the right side includes two round action buttons and a start/select button. The top edge has a prominent orange cartridge slot, which is slightly raised above the main body. The casing is made of light gray plastic with smooth, rounded edges, and the back is mostly featureless except for the continuation of the cartridge slot. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, suitable for portable use.
description: A light gray handheld gaming device with a central screen, physical control buttons, and an orange cartridge slot on top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the device's thickness and the protruding orange cartridge slot on top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the screen, control buttons, and the Game Boy Advance logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the device's slim profile and the orange cartridge slot.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth back and the orange cartridge slot extending across the top.
